message:
Merge PR #2622: feat: add --no-history flag to separate Dolt commit skipping from GC eligibility

Separates two concerns bundled by --ephemeral: skipping Dolt commit
history and GC eligibility. NoHistory beads route to wisps table
(no DOLT_COMMIT) but remain non-GC-eligible. Fixes agent identity
beads being incorrectly garbage collected.

Also adds --exclude-type to wisp gc, --type filter to wisp list,
and fixes ExcludeTypes self-join subquery.

Closes #2619

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/pull/2622
Author: mmlac

@@ -117,6 +117,9 @@ func scanIssueFrom(s issueScanner) (*types.Issue, error) {

+	if noHistory.Valid && noHistory.Int64 != 0 {
+		issue.NoHistory = true
+	}
 	if wispType.Valid {
 		issue.WispType = types.WispType(wispType.String)
 	}
